name: spawnAs
description: Spawn a command under explicit credentials.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

username.description: Username in Username, DOMAIN\Username, or user@domain form.

command.description: Program and arguments to launch after the -- separator.

logon_type.description: Optional Windows logon type passed with -l. Supported by init(): 2 interactive or 9 new credentials.

load_profile.description: Include -p/--with-profile to load the user profile.
